data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for status controls in provisioning and deprovisioning flows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding status controls for provisioning and deprovisioning flows. However, the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes but do not address the need for status controls, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: Status controls for provisioning and deprovisioning flows are not validated or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify status controls for provisioning and deprovisioning flows.
